EmailTemplate.name: Registration Confirmation
EmailTemplate.subject: Registration Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Registration_Schedule__c.Customer_Name__c},
We are excited about the registration of your unit in {!Registration_Schedule__c.Project__c} scheduled today at {!Registration_Schedule__c.Venue__c} at {!Registration_Schedule__c.Registration_Schedule_Time__c}.
Please do remember to carry along the required documents for today, that were detailed in the mail sent to you earlier.
Looking forward to meeting you at the registrar’s office.
Regards, {!Registration_Schedule__c.Project__c} CRM
